Created attachment 183053
Fix uncorrect naming of ImageMagick and add v7 to vulnerable too

Fix uncorrect naming of ImageMagick v6 ( bug #219497 ) and add v7 to vulnerable too ( bug #219627 )

Use the same name as for the vulnerabilities befor:
-> https://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/pkg-ImageMagick.html

v7 is also vulnerable -> See here: bug #219627
